turns.speaker: Client
turns.text: Rent is due, the car needs repairs, and I can't see how any of it works out. I'm panicking.

turns.speaker: Advisor
turns.text: Let's slow down and lay out the numbers so it feels less overwhelming.

turns.speaker: Client
turns.text: Every time I look at my account I feel my chest tighten. I lie awake doing the math.
